basics.name: James O'Brien
basics.label: Intellectual Property Attorney
basics.summary: Technology-focused IP counsel advising startups and Fortune 500 clients on patent strategy, software licensing, and M&A due diligence. Admitted to practice in Massachusetts and before the USPTO.

work.name: Halcyon & Partners LLP
work.summary: Lead counsel for venture-backed SaaS and biotech clients on IP portfolio development and litigation avoidance.
highlights: Negotiated 40+ enterprise software license agreements exceeding $500M aggregate value.
Managed patent prosecution docket of 200+ applications across AI, cybersecurity, and med-device.
Led IP diligence for 12 acquisitions; flagged material risks in 3 deals pre-close.

work.name: USPTO
work.description: United States Patent and Trademark Office
work.summary: Examined software and business method applications; authored office actions and interviews.
highlights: Consistently exceeded production and quality metrics.
Trained new examiners on 101 subject matter eligibility guidelines.

volunteer.organization: Boston Patent Law Association Pro Bono Clinic
volunteer.summary: Provide pro bono patent advice to individual inventors and university spin-outs.
highlights: Counselled 25 inventors on provisional application strategy.
Drafted two issued patents for nonprofit medical device innovators.

awards.title: IAM Patent 1000 – Recommended Individual
awards.summary: Recognized among leading patent practitioners in Massachusetts for software and AI technologies.

awards.title: BU Law Alumni Public Service Award
awards.summary: Honoured for sustained pro bono patent clinic work supporting underserved inventors.

certificates.name: USPTO Registration Number 72,451
certificates.issuer: United States Patent and Trademark Office

publications.name: Open Source Compliance in Enterprise Acquisitions
publications.summary: Checklist framework for identifying copyleft exposure during technical due diligence.

publications.name: AI Inventorship After Thaler
publications.publisher: Boston University Journal of Science & Technology Law
publications.summary: Analysis of US and EU approaches to patent eligibility for AI-generated inventions.

projects.name: Patent Claim Chart Generator
projects.description: Internal tool automating claim chart assembly from prosecution history PDFs.
highlights: Reduced associate prep time by 60% on invalidity opinions.
Uses Python and pdfplumber with custom NLP pipeline.

projects.name: Licensing 101 for Founders
projects.description: Quarterly workshop series for accelerator cohorts on IP basics and cap table-safe licensing.
highlights: Delivered to 300+ founders across MassChallenge and Techstars.
Materials published under CC BY-SA license.

references.name: Victoria Chen, General Counsel
references.reference: James is the rare attorney who reads the code and the claims with equal rigour. He saved our Series C round from a material OSS liability we would have missed.

references.name: Robert Walsh, Managing Partner
references.reference: Clients trust James because he translates complex IP risk into business decisions. He has grown our tech practice significantly since making partner.
